creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Sorry but all pkg_install support is being removed in September from the 
ports tree. Even with keeping ports-mgmt/pkg_install, it won't work with 
ports. You can keep using the one installing into 8.x just fine, just 
ports won't work. We've detailed this here: 
http://blogs.freebsdish.org/portmgr/2014/02/03/time-to-bid-farewell-to-the-old-pkg_-tools/
